basic_details.short_information: Airports Authority of India (AAI), Flight Inspection Unit (FIU), Safdarjung Airport, New Delhi has released a recruitment notification for NSOP Post Holders in 2026. The organisation invites applications from eligible candidates for the posts of Head of Training and Continuous Airworthiness Manager (CAMO Post Holder) on a contract basis.

content_sections.heading: AAI FIU NSOP Post Holder Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.airports_authority_of_india_aai: Flight Inspection Unit (FIU), Safdarjung Airport, New Delhi
Head of Training & Continuous Airworthiness Manager (CAMO Post Holder)
ATPL/CPL/FATA / Engineering Degree / Aircraft Maintenance Qualification (Post-wise)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Last Date for Submission of Application: 29-07-2026

content_sections.heading: AAI FIU NSOP Post Holder Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Airports Authority of India has announced vacancies for NSOP Post Holders under Flight Inspection Unit. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for AAI FIU NSOP Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required aviation qualifications and experience can apply for AAI NSOP Post Holder Recruitment 2026. The eligibility details are as follows: Head of Training: Candidates should have or have held Indian ATPL/CPL/FATA with appropriate ratings for the proposed category of operation. Head of Training Experience: Candidates should meet the standards for appointment as DE/TRE/TRI/LTC/Check Pilot except on-type experience. Alternative Experience Requirement: Candidates should have minimum total flying experience of 2500 hours, command experience on multi-engine or jet engine of 1250 hours and instrument flying experience of 250 hours. CAMO Post Holder: Candidates should possess an Engineering Degree in Aeronautical, Mechanical, Electrical, Electronic, Avionic or Aircraft Maintenance related qualification. CAMO Experience: Minimum 5 years of experience in aviation industry related to aircraft maintenance and continuing airworthiness management is required. Additional Requirement: Candidate should be SMS Qualified and have knowledge of DGCA regulations and aviation legislation.

content_sections.heading: AAI FIU NSOP Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 65 Years Selected consultants may be re-engaged up to 70 years subject to expertise, health conditions and work requirements.

content_sections.heading: AAI FIU NSOP Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: AAI FIU NSOP Recruitment 2026 - Salary Details
content_sections.text: Monthly Remuneration: Rs. 75,000/- to Rs. 1,50,000/- Salary package will be negotiable as per industry standards. Annual increment of 5% will be applicable on the negotiated monthly package.

content_sections.heading: AAI FIU NSOP Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny of Applications Shortlisting of Eligible Candidates Personal Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AAI FIU NSOP Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application format from the official notification. Fill the application form with correct personal, educational and experience details. Attach required supporting documents and certificates. Send the completed application through email to: [email protected] [email protected] Submit the application before 29 July 2026. Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the full form of AAI FIU NSOP?
faq.answer: AAI FIU NSOP stands for Airports Authority of India Flight Inspection Unit Non-Scheduled Operator Permit.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AAI FIU NSOP Post Holder Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: AAI FIU NSOP Post Holder Recruitment 2026 has announced a total of 2 vacancies.

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts available in AAI FIU NSOP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts are Head of Training (NSOP Post Holder) and Continuous Airworthiness Manager (CAMO Post Holder).

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type of AAI FIU NSOP Post Holder Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is on a contract basis. The initial contract period is 3 years, which may be extended up to 2 more years based on performance and mutual consent.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for AAI Head of Training Post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have or have held Indian ATPL/CPL/FATA with appropriate ratings and should meet the required DGCA standards. Alternatively, candidates must have the required flying experience as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification required for AAI CAMO Post Holder?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an Engineering Degree in Aeronautical, Mechanical, Electrical, Electronic, Avionic or related aircraft maintenance fields along with minimum 5 years of aviation industry experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for AAI FIU NSOP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for engagement of consultants is 65 years. Re-engagement may be possible up to 70 years subject to expertise, health conditions and work requirements.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for AAI FIU NSOP Post Holder posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a negotiable monthly remuneration ranging from Rs. 75,000/- to Rs. 1,50,000/- as per industry standards.
